overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city at night, starting at a crosswalk and moving along wet streets before turning onto a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring characteristic cyan and magenta neon reflections on rain-slicked surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes

events.description: began walking forward from the crosswalk onto the wet multi-lane street
cars passing by on the wet road, headlights reflecting off the asphalt

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the illuminated Wild Blue building

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past on the wet street, headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent cyan 'WILD BLUE' neon signage
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
elevated concrete highway overpass casting shadows on the street below
tall modern street lights with blue accent lighting on the poles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked crosswalk in a futuristic city at night, with the camera moving forward toward a building emblazoned with 'WILD BLUE' in bright cyan neon. Vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road as the camera approaches the intersection, surrounded by towering structures and the glow of holographic advertisements overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: turned left from open street onto covered sidewalk beneath the overpass
entered the shadow of the overhead highway structure, reducing ambient light significantly

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the sidewalk and proceeding under the concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk under the overpass

entered.detail: illuminated blue street sign reading 'Skyline West' mounted on concrete pillar
massive dark concrete columns supporting the elevated highway above
concrete pedestrian walkway sheltered beneath the highway overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera executes a sharp left turn from the street onto a sidewalk, entering the shadowy space beneath an elevated highway. A blue 'Skyline West' sign marks the location as the camera moves under massive concrete support pillars, transitioning from the open neon-lit street to a more enclosed pedestrian corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with towering neon advertisements and hotels

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards overhead
vehicles visible passing on the adjacent street through gaps between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, occasionally looking up at the massive neon hotel signs and skyscrapers

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign reading 'HOTEL' in bright blue letters on building facade
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge between walkway and street
illuminated advertisement panels integrated into sidewalk railings showing product promotions
massive high-rise buildings covered in holographic displays and neon signage reaching into the night sky

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the covered sidewalk, the camera moves past palm trees and illuminated advertisement benches while massive neon hotel signs and holographic billboards tower overhead. The perspective shifts upward to reveal skyscrapers piercing the night sky, their facades covered in dynamic digital displays, as the walkway continues through the canyon of futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, rain-slicked city intersection into the enclosed, towering corridors of a cyberpunk district. It begins by moving forward across a wet crosswalk toward a building emblazoned with bright cyan neon, while vehicles pass by beneath the glow of overhead holographic advertisements. As the camera reaches the intersection, it executes a sharp left turn off the street and enters the shadowy space beneath an elevated highway, passing a blue Skyline West sign and massive concrete support pillars. The scene then shifts into a covered pedestrian corridor, gliding past palm trees and illuminated benches as the environment becomes more confined. Finally, the perspective tilts upward to reveal a canyon of futuristic architecture, where skyscrapers piercing the night sky are draped in dynamic digital displays and massive neon hotel signs.
